stop_conditions: human changes or stops the frame

dkrs.title: Map governed content-use failure modes to measurable harness signals

checkpoint.promotion_decision: promote CKR and PKR candidates listed in this tree

mini_reverse_tornado.discovery_balance: identify every source category whose content influences the plan
mini_reverse_tornado.direct_metric: important source files with content_read records divided by important source files used
mini_reverse_tornado.delivery_balance: PKRs only add helper put/read-content steps and checker evidence after the source inventory is known

mini_reverse_tornado.discovery_balance: identify every final or important draft artifact that must be tied to a content hash
mini_reverse_tornado.direct_metric: important artifact writes with content_write records divided by important artifact writes
mini_reverse_tornado.delivery_balance: PKRs write drafts in .okra and publish final artifacts through write-content only after target paths are known

mini_reverse_tornado.discovery_balance: identify deterministic evidence needed to avoid single-LLM acceptance
mini_reverse_tornado.direct_metric: acceptance claims with deterministic evidence divided by total acceptance claims
mini_reverse_tornado.delivery_balance: PKRs gather verify output, content hashes, worker logs, and changed-path evidence before reporting success

pkrs.task: store and read README.md and inputs/current-signals.md through helper put/read-content
draft the loop under .okra/drafts and publish tasks/okra-governed-loop.md through helper write-content
append steering and acceptance evidence check-ins, generate status, verify store, and record evidence summary
